failure_class: engine_envelope_regression -- v6 introduced new TRPCClientError that v5 did not have
status_detail: Cycle 96 mistral envelope v6 HP-1 status='streamed' fix CONFIRMED at engine layer (status field is 'streamed' in response payload, POST 200 OK in 15ms confirming engine intercept active) BUT introduced a REGRESSION vs v5 baseline: TRPCClientError 'Unknown error' now fires at e.from on mutation #6 message.newChat result. v5 had no TRPCClientError; v6 has one. The chat area remains completely empty — renderer never materializes the warning bubble because tRPC client cannot deserialize the response despite valid JSON. Likely v6 DB REPLACE introduced a schema/transformer mismatch (SuperJSON meta.values likely missing entries for the changed status field type, OR the 'streamed' string value doesn't match expected enum). v7 needed: investigate which specific field in the v6 envelope causes tRPC client deserialization to throw 'Unknown error' (likely SuperJSON meta.values gap for status enum, or generationStatus field).
verdict_subagent: FAILED (subagent verdict PARTIAL but warning_rendered=false → overall_status FAIL per spec)
intercept_confirmed: yes — 15ms latency confirms MITM intercept (real LLM is multi-second)
TRPCClientError_evidence: Console: 'TRPCClientError: Unknown error at e.from (https://chat.mistral...) on mutation #6 message.newChat'
bypass_evidence: 15ms latency + engine intercept confirmed; no real LLM streaming
progress_vs_v5_baseline: regression -- v5 had POST 200 + no TRPCClientError + no bubble; v6 has POST 200 + TRPCClientError + no bubble. v6 introduced a new error that v5 didn't have, while still not rendering the bubble.
v5_vs_v6_diff: v5: messages[0].status='active' + generationStatus='success' → tRPC client parsed envelope OK but renderer waited for 'more chunks' (lifecycle ambiguity hypothesis). v6: messages[0].status='streamed' → tRPC client throws 'Unknown error' at e.from (likely SuperJSON meta.values missing the 'streamed' enum value type marker, OR validator schema rejects 'streamed' as out-of-enum).
regression_evidence: v6 TRPCClientError 'Unknown error' is NEW vs v5; v5's only failure was silent renderer no-op, v6 has both errors AND no-op
automation_validated: windows-mcp on user's real Chrome window worked perfectly. 5th consecutive successful run with this pattern. mistral session was already logged in (no auth gate).
errors_observed: TRPCClientError: Unknown error at e.from on mutation #6 message.newChat (NEW vs v5 — REGRESSION)

test_infra_findings.windows_mcp_validated_5th_time: Confirmed 5th consecutive successful run with windows-mcp on user's real Chrome
test_infra_findings.mistral_session_persistent: User's Mistral session persists across runs (no auth re-flow needed). Different from gamma/huggingface.

recommendation_for_dev: v6 is a REGRESSION vs v5. Recommend revert v6 OR ship v7 fix immediately.

v7 hypothesis: status='streamed' may need accompanying SuperJSON meta.values entry. Inspect tRPC v10 client source for the e.from parser path to identify which field deserialization throws 'Unknown error'. Likely candidates: status enum, generationStatus enum, or a transformer mismatch between SuperJSON v1 vs v2.

Alternative v7 approach: capture an UNINTERCEPTED real Mistral message.newChat response (delete engine intercept rule briefly) for byte-perfect comparison vs v6 — see what status field value the native server actually emits. May not be 'streamed' exactly.
Engine team can validate v7 locally by running v6 envelope through actual tRPC v10 client deserializer in unit test (no browser dependency) to identify exact field that throws.
Note: v6 DID confirm the engine intercept is active (15ms latency, status field set per fix), so the engine-side change landed correctly. The bug is in the envelope shape, not in the deployment.
notes: Cycle 96 mistral v6 status='streamed' fix landed at engine layer (confirmed in response payload, 15ms POST 200 OK) but caused REGRESSION — new TRPCClientError 'Unknown error' on mutation #6 message.newChat that v5 did NOT have. Renderer still empty. Need v7 to fix the SuperJSON/transformer mismatch the v6 status field value introduced.
